project.name: DevKey
project.description: Open-source Android keyboard combining power-user features with modern UX, AI prediction, and command-aware autocorrect

current_phase.name: v1.0 Pre-Release Execution — Phase 1
current_phase.details: Session 41 ran /writing-plans against the Session 40 tailor. Plan at .claude/plans/2026-04-08-pre-release-phase1.md — 8 phases / 14 sub-phases covering spec §6 items 1.1–1.8. Reviewed by code-review + security + completeness agents in parallel; cycle 1 REJECT (20 findings), plan-fixer-agent applied all fixes, cycle 2 APPROVE from all 3. Key plan decisions: compile-time BuildConfig.DEBUG plugin gate (new Sub-phase 3.0 enables buildFeatures.buildConfig = true), Suggest.getNextWordSuggestions with full state reset + collectGarbage + shared mEmptyComposer, load-bearing voice-log privacy policy, no escape hatches for multi-char popups or light-theme deferral. Hard user-escalation gate at Phase 5 for COMPACT letter-key scope blocks /implement. Reviews saved to .claude/plans/review_sweeps/2026-04-08-pre-release-phase1-2026-04-08/.

active_blockers: COMPACT letter-key long-press scope decision — Session 41 plan has hard user-escalation gate at Phase 5; blocks /implement until user picks (A) follow spec §4.2 or (B) spec amendment
Spec §9 Q1 distribution channel + Q2 min API target OPEN — plan tracks both as blocking Phase 1 close
Whisper model files (whisper-tiny.en.tflite + filters_vocab_en.bin) need sourcing — Phase 1 of plan has provenance scaffold; human operator sources binaries + SHA256 + license audit
SwiftKey reference screenshots not yet captured — Phase 2 of plan has scaffold ready
BinaryDictionary.getBigrams zero-length WordComposer tolerance — Phase 4.1 Step 0 prerequisite: must be verified before editing Suggest.kt; escalation path documented
GH #4 plugin security — fix in plan (Phase 3: compile-time BuildConfig.DEBUG gate via new Sub-phase 3.0); not yet implemented
400-line rule violations in 9 files — final release gate (Phase 4 of umbrella spec); tracked via GH #9
jcodemunch Kotlin import resolver broken for DevKey repo — find_importers, get_blast_radius, find_dead_code, get_dependency_graph return no-signal; fallback to search_text documented
Uncommitted state/docs backlog: Sessions 36/37/38/39/40/41 DevKey-side changes not yet committed
Wasted space in Symbols/other keyboard modes — addressed during Phase 6 layout fidelity work
Compose UI test deps incompatible with API 36 (Espresso InputManager.getInstance reflection)

metadata.session_notes: Session 41: Ran /writing-plans against .claude/tailor/2026-04-08-pre-release-phase1/. Main-agent wrote the plan directly (under 2000 lines). Plan: 8 phases / 14 sub-phases covering spec §6 Phase 1 items 1.1–1.8 in dependency order. Dispatched 3 reviewers (code-review, security, completeness) in parallel — all REJECT in cycle 1 with 20 total findings. Dispatched plan-fixer-agent with consolidated list; 20 surgical edits applied. Re-ran all 3 reviewers in parallel — all APPROVE in cycle 2. Key plan decisions: (1) Compile-time BuildConfig.DEBUG plugin gate via new Sub-phase 3.0 that enables buildFeatures.buildConfig = true (stricter than runtime FLAG_DEBUGGABLE; re-signed debuggable APK cannot reopen GH #4). (2) Suggest.getNextWordSuggestions with full state reset (mIsFirstCharCapitalized/mIsAllUpperCase/mLowerOriginalWord/mOriginalWord/mNextLettersFrequencies), collectGarbage for StringBuilder pool hygiene, shared mEmptyComposer for GC efficiency. (3) LatinIME.getLastCommittedWordBeforeCursor with 64-char lookback and letter-or-digit-or-apostrophe word boundary. (4) Load-bearing voice-log privacy policy at Phase 7.1 forbidding transcript/audio/InputConnection text content in DevKeyLogger.voice payloads. (5) SwiftKey reference .gitignore ships with ACTIVE *.png exclusion (fail-closed per spec §8). (6) Hard user-escalation gate blocking Phase 5 until COMPACT letter-key scope is decided — plan will not silently deviate from spec §4.2. (7) No escape hatches for multi-char popup UX (5.4) or light-theme deferral (6.1) — both required by spec. (8) Fn/Phone layouts documented as variants inside existing QwertyLayout/SymbolsLayout builders. (9) Spec §9 Q1 distribution channel, Q2 min API, Q4 multilingual voice tracked in plan header with Q3 SSIM>0.95 default. Reviews saved under .claude/plans/review_sweeps/2026-04-08-pre-release-phase1-2026-04-08/ (6 files, 2 cycles × 3 agents). Next session: resolve user escalation items (COMPACT scope, §9 Q1/Q2, Whisper source, SwiftKey captures, BinaryDictionary JNI tolerance check), then run /implement.
